---
title: "An example note"
documenttype: Handout
author:
  - name: Saaleh Poovathumkadavil
toc: true

version: [v.1.0]
date: last-modified
execute:
  echo: fenced
  freeze: auto
bibliography: references.bib
bibliographystyle: "springer-humanities-author-date"
format:
  tufte-inspired-html: default
---


# An example note

Start writing here.
